mapper.insert: insert into wishlist (user_id, title, description, target_amount, current_amount, icon, color, priority, status, target_date, created_at, updated_at) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{targetAmount}, #{currentAmount}, #{icon}, #{color}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{targetDate}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select * from wishlist_deposit where wishlist_id = #{wishlistId} order by created_at desc
mapper.insert: insert into wishlist_deposit (wishlist_id, user_id, amount, note, created_at) values (#{wishlistId}, #{userId}, #{amount}, #{note}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select count(*) from wishlist where user_id = #{userId}
